caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. To the right, clothing racks with various garments are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo on the left featuring a red and white design and text that is partially illegible, and a red logo on the right that reads "BOOSTLY 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary seated position, subtly shifting his facial expression and glancing slightly to the side while maintaining a neutral demeanor. The background and equipment remain static across the duration of the clip.
